Name: ATK_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the hitbox and damage parameters for attacks.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Radius
Fields.Description: Determines the radius of the hitbox (sphere/capsule).

Fields.Name: Knockback Distance
Fields.Description: Determines the distance the victim is knocked back by. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Time
Fields.Description: The duration that the victim's animations are paused for when hit. In seconds.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID: 4
Fields.Description: SpEffect ID applied to victim by this attack.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tip of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Secondary Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Secondary Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to place the sphere hitbox, or the tail of the capsule hitbox, for this hit.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Blow-off
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base blow-off value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Kinetic
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Kinetic attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Energy
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Energy attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Explosive
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Explosive attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Coral
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base Coral attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Stamina
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base stamina attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Guard Attack
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base guard attack value. Compared against the guard defense value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Guard Defense
Fields.Description: Player only. The multiplier to the base guard defense value. Compared against the guard attack value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Throw Attack
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the base throw attack value.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Poise
Fields.Description: Player only. The multiplier to apply to the base poise attack value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Kinetic
Fields.Description: The base Kinetic attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Energy
Fields.Description: The base Energy attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Explosive
Fields.Description: The base Explosive attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Coral
Fields.Description: The base Coral attack value. Used primarily for NPC attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage: Stamina
Fields.Description: The base stamina attack value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Guard Attack
Fields.Description: The base guard attack value. Compared against the guard defense value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Damage: Guard Defense
Fields.Description: The base guard defense value. Compared against the guard attack value to determine if the attack will bounce.

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description: The base poise attack value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Throw Attack
Fields.Description: The base throw attack value.

Fields.Name: Damage: Object Destruction
Fields.Description: The base object destruction value. Applied to the object's HP.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Correction: Stamina
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the reduction of stamina damage when guarding. Positive values increase guard stability, negative values decrease it.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the guard absorption value from the weapon. 0, 1x / 100, 2x / -100, guard multiplier = (guard multiplier / 100) to increase / decrease the parameter to 0. + 1)

Fields.Name: Throw Type ID
Fields.Description: The throw type ID to use with this attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Hit Type
Fields.Description: The hit collision type for this hit slot.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority for this hit slot. If there are two or more hits at the same time, the one with the higher priority will be adopted.

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Hostile
Fields.Description: The damage animation to apply to the victim of this attack.

Fields.Name: Map Hit Type
Fields.Description: Which map do you see around the attack? The set

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Invalidation
Fields.Description: Guard cut rate invalidation ratio (-100 to 100)  Normal at 0 / Completely invalidated at -100 / Doubles the defense effect of the opponent at 100  -50, 100% cut shield becomes 50% cut Become

Fields.Name: Live Bullet Attribute
Fields.Description: Live bullet attribute to set for attack

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to set for attacks

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation Type
Fields.Description: Specify particles and sounds at the time of attack (1 set by attribute, material, size)

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Material
Fields.Description: Specify particles and sounds at the time of attack (1 set by attribute, material, size)

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Size
Fields.Description: Specify particles and sounds at the time of attack (Although it is reserved, it is used, so be sure to set it blank or small)

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound
Fields.Description: The sounds to use when guarding against this attack.

Fields.Name: Hit Source Type
Fields.Description: The source of the dummy Polygon ID to use for this attack.

Fields.Name: Throw Type
Fields.Description: Flag used for throwing information

Fields.Name: Ignore Guard
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack ignores the victim's guard and applies the damage animation automatically.

Fields.Name: Disable Guard Drain
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack will not reduce the victim's stamina as a result of them guarding the attack.

Fields.Name: Disable Hit SpEffect
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack will not apply on-hit SpEffects to the victim.

Fields.Name: Disable Missed Attack Notification
Fields.Description: If ON, then the enemy AI is not given notification of a missed attack.

Fields.Name: Repeat Hit Particles
Fields.Description: If ON, does the on-hit SFX for this attack repeat forever upon collision.

Fields.Name: Enable Part Destruction
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack will count as damage to a destructable enemy part.

Fields.Name: Enable Ghost Destruction
Fields.Description: If ON, then this attack will count as damage to a ghost enemy.

Fields.Name: Ignore Invulnerability Frames
Fields.Description: If ON, then invulnerability frames (such as roll frames) are ignored by this attack. Complete invulnerability is NOT ignored however.

Fields.Name: Attack Particle Strength
Fields.Description: Attack strength [SFX]

Fields.Name: Attack Particle Direction
Fields.Description: Attack direction [SFX]

Fields.Name: Is HUD Hit Display Ignored
Fields.Description: When hit, HUD will not display Hit or Guard, so only special effects will be applied.

Fields.Name: Disable Addition Replacement during Continuous Damage
Fields.Description: Do you want to disable the function that replaces the damage with additional damage when receiving continuous damage?

Fields.Name: Is Inertia removed by Damage Reaction
Fields.Description: Can you eliminate inertia with damage reactions?

Fields.Name: Perform Occlusion Checks
Fields.Description: Whether to perform occlusion checks. If it is ○, it will be determined whether it is possible to attack the target through the shield.

Fields.Name: Special Stagger Type
Fields.Description: Behavior identification value: Causes a specific enemy to have a special reaction when hit by a specific attack.

Fields.Name: Attack Sound Strength
Fields.Description: Attack strength [SE]

Fields.Name: Rigid Body Impulse
Fields.Description: Impulse applied to the rigid body hit by the attack

Fields.Name: Decal ID [1]
Fields.Description: Decal ID 1 (directly specified)

Fields.Name: Decal ID [2]
Fields.Description: Decal ID 2 (directly specified)

Fields.Name: Invoked AI Sound upon Attack
Fields.Description: ID of AI sound generated when an attack occurs

Fields.Name: Invoked AI Sound upon Hit
Fields.Description: ID of AI sound generated at the time of hit

Fields.Name: Vibration on Hit
Fields.Description: Vibration ID on hit (-1 disabled). This is the vibration ID when none of the following three apply.

Fields.Name: Vibration on Hit: Dummy Polygon Tip
Fields.Description: Hit vibration ID when hitting the tip of the dummy polygon (-1 disabled)

Fields.Name: Vibration on Hit: Dummy Polygon Center
Fields.Description: Hit vibration ID when hitting the center of the dummy polygon (-1 disabled)

Fields.Name: Vibration on Hit: Dummy Polygon Root
Fields.Description: Hit vibration ID when hitting the root of the dummy polygon (-1 disabled)

Fields.Name: [0] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [0] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [0] Attack Trail: Tip Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the tip of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [1] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [1] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [2] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [3] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [3] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [3] Attack Trail: Tip Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the tip of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [4] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [4] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [4] Attack Trail: Tip Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the tip of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [5] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [5] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [5] Attack Trail: Tip Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the tip of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [6] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [6] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [6] Attack Trail: Tip Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the tip of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [7] Attack Trail: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Particle to display for the attack trail (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [7] Attack Trail: Root Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the root of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: [7] Attack Trail: Tip Dummy Polygon
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon that points to the tip of the attack trail capsule (-1 invalid)

Fields.Name: Defence Presentation: Particles
Fields.Description: The particles used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Defence Presentation: Sound (Disabled)
Fields.Description: The sound used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Defence Presentation: Particles (Disabled)
Fields.Description: The particles used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Is Poise Breakable
Fields.Description: Is it possible to break poise?

Fields.Name: Asset Destruction: TAE Action Type
Fields.Description: TAE action type played when an asset is destroyed by this attack

Fields.Name: Camera Vibration on Hit
Fields.Description: ID of camera vibration upon hit

Fields.Name: Camera Vibration on Guarded Hit
Fields.Description: ID of camera vibration upon guarded hit

Fields.Name: Damage Hit Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which damage is taken. It only hits once at 0.0f or less.

Fields.Name: Knockback: Attacker Speed Correction - Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: Minimum speed to determine the magnification that increases the speed of the person attacking with knockback. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Knockback: Attacker Speed Correction - Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum speed to determine the magnification that increases the speed of the person attacking with knockback. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Knockback: Attacker Speed Correction - Minimum Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to increase the speed of the person attacking with knockback (this multiplier when the speed is below the minimum speed)

Fields.Name: Knockback: Attacker Speed Correction - Maximum Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to increase the speed of the person attacking with knockback (this multiplier when the speed is below the maximum speed)

Fields.Name: Knockback: Recoil when Shooting
Fields.Description: Recoil (knockback) speed received when shooting. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Behavior on Hit: Hostile
Fields.Description: Behavior on enemy hit.

Fields.Name: Behavior on Hit: Friendly
Fields.Description: Behavior on friendly hit.

Fields.Name: Behavior on Hit: Self
Fields.Description: Behavior on self hit.

Fields.Name: Death Animation Type
Fields.Description: Determines the opponent's animation when the opponent dies from this attack.

Fields.Name: Camera Vibration ID on Map Collision
Fields.Description: ID of camera vibration when hitting the map

Fields.Name: Map Collision Camera Vibration Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which camera vibration is effective when hitting the map. In metres.

Fields.Name: Recoil Direction Type
Fields.Description: Direction that serves as a basis for calculating recoil knockback

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Friendly
Fields.Description: Damage level when hit by an ally including yourself

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Dark
Fields.Description: Player only. Multiplier to the base Dark attack power

Fields.Name: Grab Type
Fields.Description: Flag used for grab information

Fields.Name: Damage Level: Start Grab
Fields.Description: You can grab it if it is above this damage level.

Fields.Name: Grab Attachment Correction
Fields.Description: Attach correction method when grabbing

Fields.Name: Guard Judgment Type
Fields.Description: Attack position type used when determining guard/barrier

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Initial Length
Fields.Description: Starting length of the hit capsule, in metres.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Max Length
Fields.Description: Maxmimum length of the hit capsule, in metres.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Length Expansion Time
Fields.Description: Stretch the length in the direction of secondary dummy poly for this amount of time. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Max Radius
Fields.Description: Maxmimum radius of the hit capsule, in metres.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Radius Expansion Time
Fields.Description: The thickness of the area increases linearly from the radius to the maximum radius over this time.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Expansion Delay
Fields.Description: Change the shape of the area after this amount of time has passed. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID used by this hit capsule.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Particle Delete Type
Fields.Description: The deletion type for the SFX used by this hit capsule.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Generation Type
Fields.Description: The creation type used by this hit capsule.

Fields.Name: Can Hit FPS Barrier
Fields.Description: Will it hit the FPS barrier?

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Can Penetrate Character
Fields.Description: Will it penetrate the character when expanding or contracting?

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Can Penetrate Map
Fields.Description: Will it pass through map hits when expanding or contracting?

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Place Particle on Hit Location
Fields.Description: Should the SFX during expansion and contraction be based on the hit location?

Fields.Name: Use Additional Knockback Power for Blade
Fields.Description: Should the additional damage knockback power for the blade be used

Fields.Name: Correct Hit Particle Position of Melee Weapon
Fields.Description: Should the hit SFX generation position be corrected to the position between the lock dummy polys?

Fields.Name: Correct Hit Particle Direction to Bullet Direction
Fields.Description: Should the hit SFX be issued according to the direction of bullet flight?

Fields.Name: Is Attack Power based on Total Weight (Player Only)
Fields.Description: If 1, refer to the correction calculation graph parameter 'Total weight correction coefficient: attack power multiplier'

Fields.Name: Ignore Hit on Attached Assets
Fields.Description: As a performance measure, do you want to avoid hitting assets attached to characters when expanding or contracting?

Fields.Name: Ignore Hit after First Hit
Fields.Description: To improve performance, avoid checking multiple hits on the same character or asset, and be careful as the SFX generation position may shift (multiple hits are excluded after they hit, but this is excluded before they hit)

Fields.Name: Use FSDP
Fields.Description: Use FSDP (clog occurs when packet loss occurs instead of guaranteeing delivery)

Fields.Name: Is Immortality Ignored
Fields.Description: Ignore immortality special effects such as emergency PA

Fields.Name: Ignore Multi-Hits on Map Collision
Fields.Description: Exclude the map with multiple hits?

Fields.Name: Ignore Defense Particles on Impact
Fields.Description: Do you want to disable the SFX defense material change on the impact side?

Fields.Name: Disable Bullet Generation
Fields.Description: Should multi-hit information be shared while ignoring generations when the attack ID is the same?

Fields.Name: AI Detection: Engagement Level Increase
Fields.Description: The amount of engagement level that increases each time you are hit. Linked to AI detection

Fields.Name: Knockback Start Direction Type
Fields.Description: Knockback direction determination type

Fields.Name: Firing Sound Category
Fields.Description: ID for identifying SE to be played by association with attack material and attack strength

Fields.Name: Sound ID
Fields.Description: Identification ID for determining the SE to play

Fields.Name: Sound Reverb Level
Fields.Description: The level of reverb for the sound

Fields.Name: HD Vibration Slot Index
Fields.Description: HD pad vibration playback slot (0-3)

Fields.Name: Damage Judgment Type
Fields.Description: Damage Judgment Side: Which side decides the hit judgment of the attack?

Fields.Name: Recoil Knockback: Acceleration Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to start slowing down due to the recoil (knockback) you receive when shooting. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Recoil Knockback: Deceleration Time
Fields.Description: The time from when you start decelerating due to the recoil (knockback) you receive when shooting until you stop. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Recoil Knockback: Deceleration Decay Curve
Fields.Description: Deceleration speed curve coefficient due to the recoil (knockback) received when shooting (the larger the value, the stronger the brake will be at the end)

Fields.Name: Aerial Recoil Knockback: Force
Fields.Description: Recoil (knockback) speed received when shooting. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Aerial Recoil Knockback: Acceleration Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to start slowing down due to the recoil (knockback) you receive when shooting. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Recoil Knockback: Deceleration Time
Fields.Description: The time from when you start decelerating due to the recoil (knockback) you receive when shooting until you stop. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Aerial Recoil Knockback: Deceleration Decay Curve
Fields.Description: Deceleration speed curve coefficient due to the recoil (knockback) received when shooting (the larger the value, the stronger the brake will be at the end)

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Status Abnormality
Fields.Description: Multiplying the special effect's status abnormality attack power.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Status Abnormality (by Point)
Fields.Description: A multiplier correction will be applied to the special effect 'Do you apply the abnormal status attack power multiplier correction?'

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: SpEffect Attack Power (by Point)
Fields.Description: A multiplier correction is applied to the attack power [point] of the special effect.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: SpEffect Attack Power (by Rate)
Fields.Description: Multiplier correction is applied to the attack power multiplier of special effects.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: SpEffect Attack Power (by Damage)
Fields.Description: Attacker side of special effects: Performs multiplier correction for damage multiplier.

Fields.Name: Damage: Pulse Armor Interference
Fields.Description: The base Pulse Armor attack power.

Fields.Name: Damage: Impact
Fields.Description: The base Impact attack power.

Fields.Name: Damage Level Conversion ID: Hostile
Fields.Description: ID of damage level conversion parameter

Fields.Name: Damage Level Conversion ID: Friendly
Fields.Description: ID of damage level conversion parameter

Fields.Name: Damage: Core
Fields.Description: Damage applied to the core.

Fields.Name: Is Core Break Possible
Fields.Description: Can you do a core break?

Fields.Name: Additive Damage Animation Type
Fields.Description: Additive damage animation type that the opponent regenerates

Fields.Name: Add End Permanent Stun Value (by Point)
Damage: Pulse Armor Penetration
Fields.Description: Weapon para/NPC para: Used in conjunction with PA output to calculate PA cut rate.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Fan Radius
Fields.Description: In metres

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Vertical Blow-off Angle
Fields.Description: The reference direction changes depending on the setting of 'Blow-off direction correction type at the time of damage', and the horizontal direction is 0.

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Horizontal Blow-off Angle
Fields.Description: The reference direction changes depending on the setting of 'Blow-off direction correction type at the time of damage'

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Blow-off Force
Fields.Description: In kilograms x metres per second

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Vertical Axis Tilt
Fields.Description: Regarding the tilt of the rotation axis, always calculate it based on the master direction of the target (Y direction in world space) without making any corrections based on the position of the bullet, and the Y direction is 0. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Horizontal Axis Tilt
Fields.Description: Regarding the tilt of the rotation axis, always calculate it based on the master direction of the victim (Y direction in world space), without making any corrections based on the position of the victim.

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Rotation Force
Fields.Description: In kilograms x degrees per second

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Damage Lot ID
Fields.Description: The damage lot to roll upon part destruction.

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Blow-off Correction Type
Fields.Description: Correction type applied to the blow-off direction.

Fields.Name: Damage Animation Attack Direction
Fields.Description: Values ​​referenced when playing damage animation

Fields.Name: Damage: Object HP
Fields.Description: Damage to asset HP

Fields.Name: Knockback X-Axis Angle

Fields.Name: Knockback Y-Axis Angle
Fields.Description: Correction angle used in knockback direction correction type. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Part Destruction: Knockback Correction
